working-with-paths.label: Travay ak Chemen
working-with-paths.summary: Konprann chemen relatif ak òganizasyon senp dosye.

sketch0.title: Chemen relatif yo endike dosye ki nan espas travay aktyèl ou a.

sketch1.title: Dosye ede òganize fichye yo klèman.

sketch2.title: Sèvi ak chemen relatif senp, pa sa ki espesifik pou yon machin.

project.title: Pratike lekti ak ekriti ak chemen relatif

ci_read_nested_file.title: Li nan yon chemen relatif anbreye

ci_copy_between_paths.title: Kopi tèks la nan yon lòt chemen relatif

ci_count_lines_in_folder.title: Konte liy nan yon chemen fichye

sc-relative-path-folder.title: Chwazi chemen relatif la
sc-relative-path-folder.prompt: Yon fichye ki rele `input.txt` nan yon dosye ki rele `data`. Ki chemen ki refere kòrèkteman a fichye sa a nan leson sa a?
sc-relative-path-folder.hint: Itilize non dosye a an premye, epi non fichye a.

help.concept: Nonche wout relatif dosye yo nan lòd soti nan kote espas travay aktyèl la rive nan fichye sib la.
help.hint_1: Fichye a pa nan menm dosye ak kòd la; li andedan `data`.
help.hint_2: Chèche opsyon ki konekte dosye a ak fichye a ak yon ba oblique.

sc-same-folder-path.title: Chemen pou yon fichye ki toupre
sc-same-folder-path.prompt: Kòd ou a ak yon fichye ki rele `notes.txt` yo nan menm dosye a. Ki chemen ou ta dwe itilize pou louvri fichye sa a?
sc-same-folder-path.hint: Si fichye a nan menm dosye a, ou pa bezwen nonmen yon lòt dosye.

help.concept: Yon fichye ki nan menm dosye a ka louvri sèlman ak non fichye li kòm yon chemen relatif.
help.hint_1: Pa bezwen okenn non dosye anplis isit la.
help.hint_2: Chwazi chemen ki pi kout ki valab ki nonmen sèlman fichye a li menm.

mc-relative-path-benefits.title: Poukisa pou itilize chemen relatif isit la?
mc-relative-path-benefits.prompt: Chwazi tout deklarasyon ki kòrèk sou itilizasyon chemen relatif nan leson sa a.
mc-relative-path-benefits.hint: Panse sou chemen ki mache andedan espas travay ak dosye ki bay yo.

help.concept: Chemen relatif yo itil paske yo dekri kote fichye yo nan estrikti pwojè a olye pou yo depann sou yon konfigirasyon machin espesifik.
help.hint_1: Chèche deklarasyon sou dosye pwojè ak pòtabte andedan espas travay leson an.
help.hint_2: Select the choices that describe starting from the current workspace and avoiding machine-specific locations.

options.a: Yo ka montre dosye ki nan katab tankou `data/input.txt`.
options.b: Yo depann de kote konplè yon òdinatè espesifik.
options.c: Yo ede òganize fichye yo pa dosye.
options.d: Yo toujou mande yon kote konplè ki espesifik pou machin nan.

mc-open-path-examples.title: Egzanp chemen relatif valab
mc-open-path-examples.prompt: Chwazi tout egzanp chemen relatif ki valab pou stil espas travay leson sa a.
mc-open-path-examples.hint: Li kòd la oswa kesyon an ak anpil atansyon epi chwazi opsyon ki kreye konpòtman egzak demann lan mande a.

help.concept: Kesyon sa a verifye si ou ka konekte kòmand lan ak konsèp Python ki soti nan leson an.
help.hint_1: Konsantre sou sa espas vid la oswa repons lan reprezante: yon valè, yon metòd, yon kle, yon endèks, oswa yon non varyab.
help.hint_2: Eseye chak opsyon nan fraz la oswa nan liy kòd la epi kenbe sa ki fè egzanp lan mache egzakteman jan yo dekri a.

dr-read-file-steps.title: Kòdone etap pou li fichye a
dr-read-file-steps.prompt: Mete etap sa yo nan lòd kòrèk pou li yon fichye ki gen yon chemen relatif epi montre kontni li.
dr-read-file-steps.hint: Ouvri an premye, apre sa li, epi montre.

help.concept: Li yon fichye swiv yon sekans: louvri fichye a, jwenn kontni li, epi enprime rezilta a.
help.hint_1: Ou pa ka li dosye a anvan ou louvri li.
help.hint_2: Apre ou fin li tèks la nan yon varyab, dènye etap la se montre li nan panèl sòti a.

tokens.t2: Sere kontni an nan yon varyab

dr-build-nested-path.title: Bati chemen an nan lòd
dr-build-nested-path.prompt: Aranje jeton yo pou kreye chemen relatif la pou "`report.txt`" andedan dosye "`data`".
dr-build-nested-path.hint: Non dosye a vini anvan slash la ak non fichye a.

help.concept: Yon chemen relatif anbrete konstwi kòm dosye, barr, epi non fichye.
help.hint_1: Kòmanse ak dosye ki gen fichye a.
help.hint_2: Slash la separe non dosye a ak non fichye a.

fb-folder-part.title: Konplete chemen dosye a
fb-folder-part.prompt: Ranpli non dosye ki manke a.
fb-folder-part.hint: Fichye a nan dosye "`the missing term`".

help.concept: Yon chemen relatif pou yon fichye ki anndan yon dosye enkli non dosye a anvan barr la.
help.hint_1: Pati ki manke a se dosye ki genyen `input.txt`.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak non dosye ki parèt nan tout egzanp leson yo.

fb-same-folder-file.title: Konplete chemen menm dosye a
fb-same-folder-file.prompt: Ranpli non fichye ki manke a pou yon fichye ki nan menm dosye a.
fb-same-folder-file.hint: Pa bezwen non dosye isit la.

help.concept: Lè yon fichye nan menm dosye a, chemen relatif la se jis non fichye a.
help.hint_1: Blank la dwe non fichye egzak la, pa yon dosye.
help.hint_2: Chwazi opsyon ki se yon non fichye senp ki fini ak `.txt`.

ci-read-nested-file.title: Li nan yon chemen relatif anbreye
ci-read-nested-file.prompt:
Ouvri `data/input.txt`, li tèks ki nan chemen relatif sa a, epi enprime l.

Sòti ou a dwe egzakteman:
`Hello paths!`.
ci-read-nested-file.hint: Li tach la "Li nan yon chemen relatif anbreye" epi idantifye rezilta ki nesesè a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè sa a se pwogresif: kòd demaraj la se yon eta pwojè ki estab plis yon nouvo travay pou konplete.
help.hint_1: Pa efase kòd ki ap fonksyone nan etap anvan an; ajoute nouvo konpòtman ki mande nan etap sa a.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwogram nan epi konpare sòti a ak egzanp ki atann lan anvan ou tcheke repons ou.

ci-read-nested-file.starterCode:
with open("data/input.txt", "r") as file:
    # read the text and print it
    pass
ci-read-nested-file.solutionCode:
with open("data/input.txt", "r") as file:
    text = file.read()

print(text)

0.message: Ouvri data/input.txt pou li fichye anbreye a.

ci-copy-between-paths.title: Kopi tèks la nan yon lòt chemen relatif
ci-copy-between-paths.prompt:
Kopye tèks ki nan`data/source.txt`
pou mete l nan`data/copy.txt`
, epi enprime tèks ou kopye a pou nou ka konfime de fichye yo koresponn.

Rezilta w la dwe egzakteman:
`apple`

`banana`
.
ci-copy-between-paths.hint: Li tach la "Kopi tèks nan yon lòt chemen relatif" epi idantifye rezilta ki nesesè a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè sa a se pwogresif: kòd demaraj la se yon eta pwojè ki estab plis yon nouvo travay pou konplete.
help.hint_1: Pa efase kòd ki deja ap mache nan etap anvan an; ajoute nouvo konpòtman yo mande nan etap sa a.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwogram nan epi konpare sòti a ak egzanp atann lan anvan ou tcheke repons ou.

ci-copy-between-paths.starterCode:
# Read from data/source.txt
# Write the same text to data/copy.txt
# Print the copied text
ci-copy-between-paths.solutionCode:
with open("data/source.txt", "r") as source:
    text = source.read()

with open("data/copy.txt", "w") as target:
    target.write(text)

print(text)

2.message: Sèvi ak file.write() pou kreye kopi a.

ci-count-lines-in-folder.title: Konte liy nan yon chemen fichye
ci-count-lines-in-folder.prompt:
Ouvri `data/items.txt`, konte konbyen liy li genyen, epi enprime rezilta a.

Sòti ou a dwe egzakteman:
`3`.
ci-count-lines-in-folder.hint: Li tach la "Count lines from a file path" epi idantifye rezilta ki nesesè a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè sa a se pwogresif: kòd demaraj la se yon eta pwojè ki estab plis yon nouvo travay pou konplete.
help.hint_1: Pa efase kòd ki ap fonksyone nan etap anvan an; ajoute nouvo konpòtman ki mande nan etap sa a.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwogram nan epi konpare sòti a ak egzanp ki atann lan anvan ou tcheke repons ou.

ci-count-lines-in-folder.starterCode:
with open("data/items.txt", "r") as file:
    # count the lines and print the result
    pass
ci-count-lines-in-folder.solutionCode:
with open("data/items.txt", "r") as file:
    lines = file.readlines()

print(len(lines))

0.message: Ouvri data/items.txt pou konte liy li yo.

try-working-with-paths-checkpoint.title: Itilize yon chemen relatif
try-working-with-paths-checkpoint.prompt: Sèvi ak `Path` pou li `data/names.txt`, epi enprime tèks la san karaktè siplemantè.

help.concept: Konstrui chemen relatif la an premye, epi sèvi avè l pou li fichye a.
help.hint_2: Li chemen sa a epi enprime tèks fichye a san karaktè siplemantè.

try-working-with-paths-checkpoint.starterCode:
from pathlib import Path

# Build a path to data/names.txt and print its contents.

main_py.content:
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("data") / "names.txt"
print(path.read_text(), end="")

0.message: Sèvi ak Path(...) pou konstwi chemen an.

try-working-with-paths-checkpoint.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path

path = Path("data") / "names.txt"
print(path.read_text(), end="")

try-working-with-paths-sketch0.title: Bati yon chemen relatif
try-working-with-paths-sketch0.prompt: Bati chemen relatif `data/scores.txt` apati varyab `folder` ak `filename`, epi enprime chemen an.
try-working-with-paths-sketch0.hint: Konbine non dosye a, yon ba, ak non fichye a.

help.concept: Kat sa a pratike ekri yon chemen relatif kòm tèks.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak varyab `folder` an premye, apre sa `/`, epi `filename`.

try-working-with-paths-sketch0.starterCode:
folder = 'data'
filename = 'scores.txt'

# Build data/scores.txt and print it.
try-working-with-paths-sketch0.solutionCode:
folder = 'data'
filename = 'scores.txt'
path = folder + '/' + filename
print(path)

0.message: Bati chemen an apati katab ak non fichye a olye pou w tape chemen final la.

try-working-with-paths-sketch1.prompt: Itilize `Path("data") / "scores.txt"`, estoke li nan yon varyab, epi enprime chemen an.
try-working-with-paths-sketch1.hint: Enpòte `Path`, konekte de moso yo ak `/`, epi enprime rezilta a.

help.concept: Kat sa a pratike konstriksyon yon objè chemen olye de yon chèn senp.
help.hint_2: Enprime varyab chemen an apre ou fin konstwi li.

try-working-with-paths-sketch1.starterCode:
from pathlib import Path

# Create Path('data') / 'scores.txt' and print it.
try-working-with-paths-sketch1.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('data') / 'scores.txt'
print(path)

paths-relative-basics.title: Relative paths point to files from your current workspace
paths-relative-basics.bodyMarkdown:
A **relative path** tells Python where a file is by starting from the current project folder, not from a full computer-specific location. In this lesson, that means paths like `notes.txt` or `data/input.txt`.

Here is a simple example:

```python
with open("data/input.txt", "r") as file:
    text = file.read()

print(text)
```

Step by step:

- `open("data/input.txt", "r")` looks for a folder named `data` and then a file named `input.txt` inside it.
- `"r"` means read mode.
- `file.read()` gets the file's contents.
- `print(text)` sends those contents to the output panel.

If the file is in the same folder as your code, the path can be shorter:

```python
with open("notes.txt", "r") as file:
    print(file.read())
```

Concrete example:

- `notes.txt` means “open the file named `notes.txt` right here.”
- `data/notes.txt` means “go into the `data` folder, then open `notes.txt`.”

paths-folders-and-organization.title: Folders help organize files clearly
paths-folders-and-organization.bodyMarkdown:
Projects often keep files in folders so related data stays together. A path like `data/scores.txt` is easier to understand than a random file name with no structure.

Example:

```python
with open("data/scores.txt", "r") as file:
    lines = file.readlines()

print(len(lines))
```

Line by line:

- `open("data/scores.txt", "r")` opens a file inside the `data` folder.
- `readlines()` makes a list of lines from the file.
- `len(lines)` counts how many lines were read.
- `print(len(lines))` shows that count in the output panel.

Worked example:

If `data/scores.txt` contains:

```python
90
85
100
```

then `len(lines)` is `3`, so the output is:

```python
3
```

Using folders also makes it easier to tell input files from output files, such as `data/input.txt` and `data/report.txt`.

paths-safe-habits.title: Use simple relative paths, not machine-specific ones
paths-safe-habits.bodyMarkdown:
A good beginner habit is to use **simple relative paths** that work inside the lesson workspace. These paths are portable because they do not depend on one specific computer.

Good examples:

```python
"notes.txt"
"data/input.txt"
"data/output.txt"
```

Avoid machine-specific paths for this lesson. They are not needed here and often break when code runs somewhere else.

Worked example:

Suppose you want to copy text from one file to another:

```python
with open("data/input.txt", "r") as source:
    text = source.read()

with open("data/output.txt", "w") as target:
    target.write(text)

print(text)
```

What happens:

- The first `with open(...)` reads from `data/input.txt`.
- The second `with open(...)` writes to `data/output.txt`.
- `print(text)` gives you visible output so you can confirm what was written.
